description: CompositionRed and white top made of 100% cotton, has a deep square neck with lace embellishment, three quarter length raglan sleeves with gathered cuffs, pin tucks at front which open out below, two pockets on front with contrast openings and a curved hemFitLooseWash careMachine wash using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyWash and dry inside outDo not bleach, do not wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm ironwrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this pretty top with its Western styling is kept feminine with lacing embellishments, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for a cowgirl look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8”
